fees.title: Fee configuration
fees.subtitle: Percentage, flat, payer, auction commission, and third-party splits — persisted via admin finance API when signed in with a token.

refundBreakdowns.title: Refund breakdowns
refundBreakdowns.subtitle: Aggregated refund volume from <mono>GET /api/v1/admin/finance/refund-breakdowns</mono>. Row shape is normalized from common Laravel list patterns; confirm field names with your API when going live.
refundBreakdowns.totalHint: If the API omits a total, this figure is the sum of the breakdown rows below.

payouts.title: Organizer payouts
payouts.subtitle: Queue from <mono>GET /api/v1/admin/finance/payouts</mono> with the Postman lifecycle actions (approve → processing → paid / failed, or reject). Reject may include an optional <mono>reason</mono> in the JSON body; an empty <mono>{}</mono> is valid.
payouts.noMatches: No payouts match your search and filters.

financeCompliance.title: Finance compliance
financeCompliance.subtitle: Postman-aligned tools: <mono>POST /api/v1/admin/finance/fee-adjustments</mono>, <mono>GET …/finance/organizers/{id}/kyc</mono>, and document <mono>…/approve</mono> / <mono>…/reject</mono>. Mock data uses organizer ids <mono>{{ids}}</mono>.
financeCompliance.defaultReason: Manual platform fee correction after dispute resolution.
financeCompliance.kycLoadFailed: Could not load KYC (check id or API response).
financeCompliance.noDocuments: No documents returned for this organizer.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Active channel flags from <mono>GET …/notification-settings</mono> (root <mono>active</mono> / <mono>history</mono>), saved with <mono>PATCH …/notification-settings</mono> (snake_case body). Operational views: <mono>GET …/notifications/recent</mono>, <mono>GET …/notifications/delivery-log</mono>, and <mono>POST …/notifications/test</mono> (body is backend-defined).
notifications.deliverySearchPlaceholder: Search id, channel, status, recipient, template…
notifications.testHint: POST an object your API expects (often empty <mono>{}</mono>). Invalid JSON is rejected before calling the network.
notifications.notifyJsonRoot: Root JSON value must be an object.

systemStatus.title: System status
systemStatus.subtitle: <mono>GET /api/v1/admin/health</mono> and <mono>GET /api/v1/admin/version</mono> — read-only operational snapshots when API read mode and a bearer token are available.
